$schema.description: The JSON schema to use for validation

comment.description: A comment to provide documentation for this request

method.description: The HTTP method to use for this request

url.description: The URL to use for this request

params.description: The query parameters to send with this request

form_data.description: Form x-www-form-urlencoded data to pass in the request body

headers.description: The HTTP headers to send with this request

save_responses.description: Whether to save .response files in the same dir as the .request file

extract.description: JSON node, or Text pattern (with regex group) to extract from response

json_path.description: A JSON Path expression to extract a single field from JSON

text_pattern.description: A Python regex pattern with a single REGEX GROUP to be extracted from the response

env.description: Choose to store the extracted field in either the global env (default), or currently selected env from your collection

var.description: The var name (default is token) in the environment to store the extracted value in
